case_title: QUEST DISCOVERY SERVICES VS. DAE HEE KIM - ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM PENELOPE PAHL FILED BY QUEST DISCOVERY SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUEST DISCOVERY SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM - ATTORNEY AT LAW, DAE HEE $305.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $345.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $305.00 FILED BY QUEST DISCOVERY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT KIM - ATTORNEY AT LAW, DAE HEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-28-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED AND POS BY MAIL. SERVED MAR-24-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM - ATTORNEY AT LAW, DAE HEE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-15-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COURT DOES NOT ACCEPT PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON APRIL 1, 2009. THERE IS NO INDICATION ON PROOF OF SERVICE OF DATE AND WHERE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS MAILED. (SUB-SERVICE) JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELPOE PAHL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY QUEST DISCOVERY SERVICES
